OUST.catalyst: Expected: major OEM win, EBITDA breakeven, auto-sales inflection
OUST.exit: Sell if: cash <12mo; market share loss; better lidar alternative

SMR.thesis: Small modular nuclear reactors — first-mover US licensing
SMR.catalyst: Expected: NRC design approval, first EPC utility contract
SMR.exit: Sell if: regulatory delay >18mo; cost overrun >30%; no new customers

ELF.thesis: Value cosmetics — viral DTC brand, strong margins, cash flow
ELF.catalyst: Expected: international expansion, comps growth, margin sustain
ELF.exit: Sell if: Valuation >45x P/E with flat growth; brand fatigue; multiple contraction
